title: The Search for a Cure
description: Pages 11–15 focus on the search for a cure, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as rosinante reveals his true nature and chooses to save Law from Doflamingo, even as the Donquixote Family closes in.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Hm? Corazon. What happened to you? What's that wound from?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That looks pretty deep... can I safely assume they got the worst of it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Enemy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ah, I see. Take care of yourself then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did he just... cover for me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What is he think- ing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Is he crazy!? That idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We will head for Finance Mountain in the South- East.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And while constantly broadcasting a signal of our location to you, we will carry out the trade.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: In the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We told you our real names, didn't we!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Not like I really care either way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You're no fun! Booooring!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter whether or not I'm fun; I'm gonna die soon anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's true though; I've been doing more and more fun things recently.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I've got about a year left, huh... my death might even come earlier than my calculations suggest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: More importantly, if you've got a real name, tell it to us dasuyan!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Otherwise I'mma rat on you to doffy about what happened 2 years ago!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Trafalgar D. Water Law

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I'm actually not supposed to tell people about it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: And it isn't a codename like your guys' names, so I can't just change it.

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: "D" is a secret name, and "water" is taboo...my family has, over generations-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: psht, it ain't even that cool.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Seriously Dasuyan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: You're the ones that were pestering me for it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: WAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Oi! Leggo! What is it!?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: corazon! What do you want!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Ahh...he's probably gonna get bullied again.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Cora-san's seriously looks pissed...more so than usual...

summary: The Search for a Cure advances the Dressrosa story through Doflamingo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
